files.contents: Hello World

# Express + Tailwind Hello

This app serves a simple Hello World page and provides an API to get/set the current color value in memory.

Scripts:
- Install deps: npm install
- Build TypeScript: npm run build
- Build CSS (Tailwind): npm run build:css
- Start (after build): npm start
- Dev (hot-reload server): npm run dev
- Test: npm test

API:
- GET /api/color -> { color: "#000000" }
- POST /api/color with JSON body { "color": "#ff0000" } or { "color": "rgb(255, 0, 0)" }
  - Returns 200 with { color: "..." } on success
  - Returns 400 with { error: "..." } on invalid input

Note: Color is stored in-memory and resets when the server restarts.

notes: Run `npm run build` then `npm run build:css` and `npm start` to serve the app with compiled assets.
During development you can run `npm run dev` to start the server; run `npm run build:css` in another terminal to rebuild styles when needed.
